title: Fix customer import encoding bug
description: Customer import module experiences intermittent encoding errors when processing CSV files containing non-ASCII characters. The test_parse_csv_encoding test fails with an assertion error indicating that special characters are garbled. This issue affects customers with international data. Need to fix encoding handling in parse_csv and ensure proper test coverage.

title: Spike: prototype chardet-based encoding detection
description: Old research spike that prototyped chardet-based auto-detection for the import module. Superseded by tracking issue TASK-7890; retained only for historical reference.

title: Document encoding fix in import guide
description: Follow-up documentation task to update the import guide once the encoding fix lands.
